segments.scene_description: A static elevated view of a gothic classroom interior with stone architecture and arched windows. Several students sit at wooden desks arranged in rows, while diffused morning light filters through the tall windows. The camera remains stationary throughout, capturing the atmospheric low-light environment of what appears to be a medieval fantasy school setting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static, atmospheric perspective of a dimly lit gothic classroom that remains suspended in a quiet, scholarly mood. It begins with an elevated view of the interior, where heavy stone architecture and tall arched windows define the space. As the camera lingers, diffused morning light filters through the glass, softly illuminating the rows of wooden desks where students sit in silence. The scene remains fixed in this low-light environment, emphasizing the stillness of the medieval fantasy school setting.
